name: Splatoon - RPG
description:
Okay uh...

That Express didn't do too well and I think I know why but let's just throw this out and now just have next

WELCOME TO SPLATOON RPG

This RPG bot takes place in Splatoon 1-2-3 video game series made by Nintendo where Inklings and Octolings takes home in Splatsville or Inkopolis

You will start as two being as either an Inkling or an Octoling, the bot will give you an assorted ink color for your hair...err, tentacles...hair?

Whatever, just go crazy. Write a revivew if I mess any bit of the lore up.
creator: Phobos999
